name: collapsible-group
title: Collapsible Group
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Accordion-style collapsible section with smooth grid-row animation. Uses CSS grid-template-rows for height transitions without DOM measurement.
docs: Pass `open` boolean and `onToggle` callback for controlled expand/collapse. Set `active` for highlight state, `dimmed` for disabled. Customize animation with `duration` (ms).
